text:
Aryabhatiya with the
translation of W.F. Clark throws much light on this.]
He must be thoroughly acquainted with the Earth's rotation
on Its own axis round the Sun and its revolution along the circle
of constellations, its shape and such other details, the latitude of
a place and its complement, the difference in the lengths of the
day and night (lit. diameter of the Day-circle), the Garakhandas
of a place, rising periods of the different Sign-; of the zodiac at a
given place, the methods of converting the length of shadow into
time (in Ghatls) and time into the length of shadow and such other
things, as well as those to find out the exact time in Ghafis that
has elapsed since Sunrise or Sunset at any required time from the
position of the Sun or from the Ascendant, as the case may be.
